sentence: 所有企业的平均消警时间中位数是多少？
sql: SELECT AVG(closeAlarmAverageDuration) AS median FROM ( SELECT closeAlarmAverageDuration FROM v_ai_ipark_close_alarm_average_duration ORDER BY closeAlarmAverageDuration LIMIT 2 - (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM v_ai_ipark_close_alarm_average_duration) % 2 -- 奇偶数判断 OFFSET (SELECT (COUNT(*) - 1) / 2 FROM v_ai_ipark_close_alarm_average_duration) -- 计算偏移量 ) AS median_values;

sentence: 企业编码为ZJDS001的公司在第20周的风险分析对象类型是什么？
sql: SELECT execute_hazard_type FROM v_ai_ipark_dp_evaluation WHERE company_code = 'ZJDS001' AND cycle_number = 20;

sentence: 今年第25周，处于正常运营状态的企业中，运行效果为“优”的有多少家？
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM v_ai_ipark_dp_evaluation WHERE cycle_number = 25 AND calendar_year = YEAR(CURDATE()) AND enterprise_status = '正常运营' AND evaluation_level = '优';

sentence: 公司名称为“舟山海洋化工有限公司”的企业在第18周的运行效果得分是多少？
sql: SELECT run_effect_score FROM v_ai_ipark_dp_evaluation WHERE companyName = '舟山海洋化工有限公司' AND cycle_number = 18;

sentence: 园区今年第10周的企业隐患整改完成率有没有达到90%以上？
sql: SELECT corrective_completion_rate FROM v_ai_ipark_dp_evaluation WHERE calendar_year = YEAR(CURDATE()) AND cycle_number = 10;

sentence: 上周运行效果被评为“差”的企业有哪些？
sql: SELECT companyName FROM v_ai_ipark_dp_evaluation WHERE evaluation_level = '差' AND cycle_number = (SELECT MAX(cycle_number) FROM v_ai_ipark_dp_evaluation);

sentence: 2023年第四季度，园区内所有企业的风险分析完成率平均值是多少？
sql: SELECT AVG(analysis_completion_rate) AS average_analysis_completion_rate FROM v_ai_ipark_dp_evaluation WHERE calendar_year = 2023 AND cycle_number BETWEEN 41 AND 52;

sentence: 请问第40周所有企业的平均运行效果得分是多少？
sql: SELECT AVG(run_effect_score) AS average_run_effect_score FROM v_ai_ipark_dp_evaluation WHERE cycle_number = 40;

sentence: 今年第15周，某企业的隐患排查完成率和整改完成率分别是多少？
sql: SELECT check_completion_rate AS '隐患排查完成率', corrective_completion_rate AS '隐患整改完成率' FROM v_ai_ipark_dp_evaluation WHERE cycle_number = 15 AND calendar_year = YEAR(CURDATE());

sentence: 2024年第5周，园区内所有企业的隐患排查完成率是否都超过80%？
sql: SELECT MIN(check_completion_rate) AS min_check_completion_rate FROM v_ai_ipark_dp_evaluation WHERE calendar_year = 2024 AND cycle_number = 5;

sentence: 2023年第22周，运行效果为“优”的企业中，哪家的隐患整改完成率最高？
sql: SELECT companyName FROM v_ai_ipark_dp_evaluation WHERE calendar_year = 2023 AND cycle_number = 22 AND evaluation_level = '优' ORDER BY corrective_completion_rate DESC LIMIT 1;

sentence: 请查一下浙江某公司今年第20周的风险分析完成率。
sql: SELECT analysis_completion_rate FROM v_ai_ipark_dp_evaluation WHERE company_code = '浙江某公司' AND calendar_year = YEAR(CURDATE()) AND cycle_number = 20;

sentence: 今年第25周，隐患整改完成率超过95%的企业有哪些？
sql: SELECT company_code, companyName FROM v_ai_ipark_dp_evaluation WHERE cycle_number = 25 AND calendar_year = YEAR(CURDATE()) AND corrective_completion_rate > 95;

sentence: 能否列出上周风险分析对象类型为“重大危险源”的所有企业？
sql: SELECT companyName FROM v_ai_ipark_dp_evaluation WHERE execute_hazard_type = '重大危险源' AND cycle_number = WEEK(CURDATE()) - 1;

sentence: 今年第10周处于停产状态的企业运行效果如何？
sql: SELECT evaluation_level FROM v_ai_ipark_dp_evaluation WHERE cycle_number = 10 AND enterprise_status = '停产';

sentence: 上周有哪些企业的隐患排查完成率低于80%？
sql: SELECT company_code, companyName, check_completion_rate FROM v_ai_ipark_dp_evaluation WHERE cycle_number = (SELECT MAX(cycle_number) FROM v_ai_ipark_dp_evaluation WHERE cycle_number < EXTRACT(WEEK FROM CURDATE())) AND check_completion_rate < 80;

sentence: 2023年第25周风险分析对象类型为“仓储区域”的企业整改完成率是多少？
sql: SELECT AVG(corrective_completion_rate) AS average_corrective_completion_rate FROM v_ai_ipark_dp_evaluation WHERE calendar_year = 2023 AND cycle_number = 25 AND execute_hazard_type = '仓储区域';

sentence: 第30周企业状态为“停产整顿”的公司运行效果如何？

sentence: 园区出口总额在近三个月里是上升还是下降了？
sql: SELECT CASE WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN report_month = DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE() - INTERVAL 1 MONTH, '%Y-%m') THEN park_export_value ELSE 0 END) > SUM(CASE WHEN report_month = DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE() - INTERVAL 2 MONTH, '%Y-%m') THEN park_export_value ELSE 0 END) AND SUM(CASE WHEN report_month = DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE() - INTERVAL 2 MONTH, '%Y-%m') THEN park_export_value ELSE 0 END) > SUM(CASE WHEN report_month = DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE() - INTERVAL 3 MONTH, '%Y-%m') THEN park_export_value ELSE 0 END) THEN '上升' WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN report_month = DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE() - INTERVAL 1 MONTH, '%Y-%m') THEN park_export_value ELSE 0 END) < SUM(CASE WHEN report_month = DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE() - INTERVAL 2 MONTH, '%Y-%m') THEN park_export_value ELSE 0 END) AND SUM(CASE WHEN report_month = DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE() - INTERVAL 2 MONTH, '%Y-%m') THEN park_export_value ELSE 0 END) < SUM(CASE WHEN report_month = DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE() - INTERVAL 3 MONTH, '%Y-%m') THEN park_export_value ELSE 0 END) THEN '下降' ELSE '稳定' END AS trend FROM v_ai_ipark_economic_operation;

sentence: 企业名称是浙江石化的企业，它的重大危险源监测指标有哪些？
sql: SELECT target_name FROM v_ai_ipark_hm_monitor_metric WHERE enterprise_name = '浙江石化';

sentence: 指标名称为液位高度的监测点分布在哪些企业？
sql: SELECT DISTINCT enterprise_name FROM v_ai_ipark_hm_monitor_metric WHERE target_name = '液位高度';

sentence: 设备设施名称是储罐的重大危险源，对应的指标位号是什么？
sql: SELECT sensor_number FROM v_ai_ipark_hm_monitor_metric WHERE equip_category = '储罐';

sentence: 重大危险源名称叫PX装置的，现在有哪些监测指标在线？

sentence: 我想查一下指标位号为LT-101的监测数据属于哪家企业？

sentence: 当前离线的监测指标中，有多少个属于‘储罐’类设备？

sentence: 重大危险源名称包含“储罐”的，它们的指标是否全部在线？
sql: SELECT hazard_name, CASE WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN target_status = '在线' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = COUNT(*) THEN '是' ELSE '否' END AS all_online FROM v_ai_ipark_hm_monitor_metric WHERE hazard_name LIKE '%储罐%' GROUP BY hazard_name;

sentence: 有没有某个具体指标位号的详细信息？

sentence: 这个设备设施下配置了哪些指标名称？

sql: SELECT enterprise_name, equip_category FROM v_ai_ipark_hm_monitor_metric;

sentence: 某指标位号属于哪个设备设施？

sentence: 能查一下液化石油气储罐这个重大危险源对应的监测指标状态吗？

sentence: 最近三天内，预警等级为橙色或红色的企业事件都有哪些？

sql: SELECT DISTINCT companyName FROM v_ai_ipark_hm_warning_event WHERE startWarningTime >= NOW() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR;

sentence: 某化工厂的重大危险源最近一次预警是什么时候开始和结束的？
sql: SELECT startWarningTime, endWarningTime FROM v_ai_ipark_hm_warning_event WHERE companyName = '某化工厂' ORDER BY startWarningTime DESC LIMIT 1;

sentence: 有没有企业在过去24小时内触发了重大危险源预警？
sql: SELECT companyName FROM v_ai_ipark_hm_warning_event WHERE startWarningTime >= NOW() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR;

sql: SELECT hazardName FROM v_ai_ipark_hm_warning_event WHERE warningStatus = '正在持续';

sentence: 所有红色预警的起始时间都在本周内的有哪些？

sentence: 请查一下预警状态为已摘警、但预警等级是红色的事件记录。

sql: SELECT companyName FROM v_ai_ipark_hm_warning_event WHERE warningStatus = '已摘警' AND endWarningTime >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 WEEK);

sentence: 预警起始时间在2023年12月1日之后的所有事件有哪些？
sql: SELECT * FROM v_ai_ipark_hm_warning_event WHERE startWarningTime > '2023-12-01';

sentence: 能否按企业名称分组，列出每家公司的最新一条预警信息？
sql: SELECT companyName, hazardName, eventDesc, warningLevel, startWarningTime, endWarningTime, warningStatus FROM ( SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY companyName ORDER BY startWarningTime DESC) AS rn FROM v_ai_ipark_hm_warning_event ) ranked WHERE rn = 1;

sentence: 有没有预警销警时间还没填写的事件？
sql: SELECT * FROM v_ai_ipark_hm_warning_event WHERE endWarningTime IS NULL;

sentence: 哪些企业的重大危险源预警描述里提到了“超温”？

sentence: 今年3月园区内所有企业的总税收是多少？
sql: SELECT SUM(taxation) AS total_taxation FROM v_ai_ipark_ia_enterprise_output_value WHERE month = 3 AND year = YEAR(CURRENT_DATE);

sentence: R企业2023年12月的产值是多少万元？
sql: SELECT output_value FROM v_ai_ipark_ia_enterprise_output_value WHERE enterprise_name = 'R企业' AND year = 2023 AND month = 12;

sentence: Q园区2023年规上企业和非规上企业的数量各是多少？
sql: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN rules_on_corporate = '是' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS 规上企业数量, SUM(CASE WHEN rules_on_corporate = '否' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS 非规上企业数量 FROM v_ai_ipark_ia_enterprise_output_value WHERE park_name = 'Q园区' AND year = 2023;

sentence: P企业2023年全年的营收和税收分别排在园区第几名？
sql: SELECT FIND_IN_SET(revenue, ( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(revenue ORDER BY revenue DESC) FROM v_ai_ipark_ia_enterprise_output_value WHERE year = 2023 AND park_name = ( SELECT park_name FROM v_ai_ipark_ia_enterprise_output_value WHERE enterprise_name = 'P企业' AND year = 2023 ) )) AS revenue_rank, FIND_IN_SET(taxation, ( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(taxation ORDER BY taxation DESC) FROM v_ai_ipark_ia_enterprise_output_value WHERE year = 2023 AND park_name = ( SELECT park_name FROM v_ai_ipark_ia_enterprise_output_value WHERE enterprise_name = 'P企业' AND year = 2023 ) )) AS taxation_rank FROM v_ai_ipark_ia_enterprise_output_value WHERE enterprise_name = 'P企业' AND year = 2023;

sentence: 哪个企业的能耗最高？具体数值是多少tce？
sql: SELECT enterprise_name, MAX(energy_consumption) AS highest_energy_consumption FROM v_ai_ipark_ia_enterprise_output_value ORDER BY highest_energy_consumption DESC LIMIT 1;

sentence: 今年上半年规上企业的平均利润是多少？
sql: SELECT AVG(profit) AS average_profit FROM v_ai_ipark_ia_enterprise_output_value WHERE rules_on_corporate = '是' AND year = YEAR(CURRENT_DATE) AND month BETWEEN 1 AND 6;

sentence: 哪个月份园区企业的总营收最高？具体数值是多少？
sql: SELECT month, SUM(revenue) AS total_revenue FROM v_ai_ipark_ia_enterprise_output_value GROUP BY month ORDER BY total_revenue DESC LIMIT 1;

sentence: 2023年园区中营收最高的企业是哪家？
sql: SELECT enterprise_name FROM v_ai_ipark_ia_enterprise_output_value WHERE year = 2023 ORDER BY revenue DESC LIMIT 1;

sentence: 规上企业和非规上企业在能耗方面有什么差异？
sql: SELECT AVG(energy_consumption) AS average_energy_consumption, rules_on_corporate FROM v_ai_ipark_ia_enterprise_output_value GROUP BY rules_on_corporate;

sentence: 非规上企业在2022年的平均利润是多少？
sql: SELECT AVG(profit) AS average_profit FROM v_ai_ipark_ia_enterprise_output_value WHERE rules_on_corporate = '否' AND year = 2022;

sql: SELECT month, SUM(taxation) AS total_taxation FROM v_ai_ipark_ia_enterprise_output_value WHERE park_name = 'XX园区' AND year = 2023 GROUP BY month ORDER BY month;

sentence: 能不能按园区统计2023年每家企业的税收情况？
sql: SELECT park_name, enterprise_name, taxation FROM v_ai_ipark_ia_enterprise_output_value WHERE year = 2023 ORDER BY park_name, enterprise_name;

sentence: 2023年全年，规上企业的平均营收是多少？

sentence: XX园区里能耗最低的企业是哪家？

sentence: 各月份中，哪个月的总利润最高？

sentence: 有没有企业连续三个月营收下降？是哪些企业？
sql: SELECT e1.enterprise_name FROM v_ai_ipark_ia_enterprise_output_value e1 JOIN v_ai_ipark_ia_enterprise_output_value e2 ON e1.enterprise_name = e2.enterprise_name AND e1.year = e2.year AND e1.month = e2.month - 1 JOIN v_ai_ipark_ia_enterprise_output_value e3 ON e1.enterprise_name = e3.enterprise_name AND e1.year = e3.year AND e1.month = e3.month - 2 WHERE e1.revenue > e2.revenue AND e2.revenue > e3.revenue;

sql: SELECT CASE WHEN today.hoisting_work_count > yesterday.hoisting_work_count THEN '增加了' WHEN today.hoisting_work_count < yesterday.hoisting_work_count THEN '减少了' ELSE '保持不变' END AS trend FROM v_ai_ipark_job_risk_analysis_jobtype_count today JOIN v_ai_ipark_job_risk_analysis_jobtype_count yesterday ON today.warning_date = CURDATE() AND yesterday.warning_date = CURDATE() - INTERVAL 1 DAY;

sentence: 今天园区里哪类特殊作业最多？总数是多少？
sql: SELECT CASE WHEN hot_work_count >= ALL (confined_space_work_count, blind_plate_work_count, high_altitude_work_count, hoisting_work_count, temporary_power_work_count, excavation_work_count, road_closure_work_count) THEN '动火作业' WHEN confined_space_work_count >= ALL (hot_work_count, blind_plate_work_count, high_altitude_work_count, hoisting_work_count, temporary_power_work_count, excavation_work_count, road_closure_work_count) THEN '受限空间作业' WHEN blind_plate_work_count >= ALL (hot_work_count, confined_space_work_count, high_altitude_work_count, hoisting_work_count, temporary_power_work_count, excavation_work_count, road_closure_work_count) THEN '盲板抽堵作业' WHEN high_altitude_work_count >= ALL (hot_work_count, confined_space_work_count, blind_plate_work_count, hoisting_work_count, temporary_power_work_count, excavation_work_count, road_closure_work_count) THEN '高处作业' WHEN hoisting_work_count >= ALL (hot_work_count, confined_space_work_count, blind_plate_work_count, high_altitude_work_count, temporary_power_work_count, excavation_work_count, road_closure_work_count) THEN '吊装作业' WHEN temporary_power_work_count >= ALL (hot_work_count, confined_space_work_count, blind_plate_work_count, high_altitude_work_count, hoisting_work_count, excavation_work_count, road_closure_work_count) THEN '临时用电作业' WHEN excavation_work_count >= ALL (hot_work_count, confined_space_work_count, blind_plate_work_count, high_altitude_work_count, hoisting_work_count, temporary_power_work_count, road_closure_work_count) THEN '动土作业' WHEN road_closure_work_count >= ALL (hot_work_count, confined_space_work_count, blind_plate_work_count, high_altitude_work_count, hoisting_work_count, temporary_power_work_count, excavation_work_count) THEN '断路作业' END AS most_common_special_job, MAX(hot_work_count, confined_space_work_count, blind_plate_work_count, high_altitude_work_count, hoisting_work_count, temporary_power_work_count, excavation_work_count, road_closure_work_count) AS total_count FROM v_ai_ipark_job_special_job_key_today;

sentence: 园区今天哪类高危作业最多？
sql: SELECT CASE WHEN hot_work_count >= ALL (confined_space_work_count, blind_plate_work_count, high_altitude_work_count, hoisting_work_count, temporary_power_work_count, excavation_work_count, road_closure_work_count) THEN '动火作业' WHEN confined_space_work_count >= ALL (hot_work_count, blind_plate_work_count, high_altitude_work_count, hoisting_work_count, temporary_power_work_count, excavation_work_count, road_closure_work_count) THEN '受限空间作业' WHEN blind_plate_work_count >= ALL (hot_work_count, confined_space_work_count, high_altitude_work_count, hoisting_work_count, temporary_power_work_count, excavation_work_count, road_closure_work_count) THEN '盲板抽堵作业' WHEN high_altitude_work_count >= ALL (hot_work_count, confined_space_work_count, blind_plate_work_count, hoisting_work_count, temporary_power_work_count, excavation_work_count, road_closure_work_count) THEN '高处作业' WHEN hoisting_work_count >= ALL (hot_work_count, confined_space_work_count, blind_plate_work_count, high_altitude_work_count, temporary_power_work_count, excavation_work_count, road_closure_work_count) THEN '吊装作业' WHEN temporary_power_work_count >= ALL (hot_work_count, confined_space_work_count, blind_plate_work_count, high_altitude_work_count, hoisting_work_count, excavation_work_count, road_closure_work_count) THEN '临时用电作业' WHEN excavation_work_count >= ALL (hot_work_count, confined_space_work_count, blind_plate_work_count, high_altitude_work_count, hoisting_work_count, temporary_power_work_count, road_closure_work_count) THEN '动土作业' WHEN road_closure_work_count >= ALL (hot_work_count, confined_space_work_count, blind_plate_work_count, high_altitude_work_count, hoisting_work_count, temporary_power_work_count, excavation_work_count) THEN '断路作业' END AS most_dangerous_job FROM v_ai_ipark_job_special_job_today WHERE park_code = 'DaiShanEconomicDevelopmentZone';

sentence: 今天所有类型的特殊作业中，哪一类最多？数量是多少？
sql: SELECT GREATEST(hot_work_count, confined_space_work_count, blind_plate_work_count, high_altitude_work_count, hoisting_work_count, temporary_power_work_count, excavation_work_count, road_closure_work_count) AS max_count, CASE WHEN GREATEST(hot_work_count, confined_space_work_count, blind_plate_work_count, high_altitude_work_count, hoisting_work_count, temporary_power_work_count, excavation_work_count, road_closure_work_count) = hot_work_count THEN '动火作业' WHEN GREATEST(hot_work_count, confined_space_work_count, blind_plate_work_count, high_altitude_work_count, hoisting_work_count, temporary_power_work_count, excavation_work_count, road_closure_work_count) = confined_space_work_count THEN '受限空间作业' WHEN GREATEST(hot_work_count, confined_space_work_count, blind_plate_work_count, high_altitude_work_count, hoisting_work_count, temporary_power_work_count, excavation_work_count, road_closure_work_count) = blind_plate_work_count THEN '盲板抽堵作业' WHEN GREATEST(hot_work_count, confined_space_work_count, blind_plate_work_count, high_altitude_work_count, hoisting_work_count, temporary_power_work_count, excavation_work_count, road_closure_work_count) = high_altitude_work_count THEN '高处作业' WHEN GREATEST(hot_work_count, confined_space_work_count, blind_plate_work_count, high_altitude_work_count, hoisting_work_count, temporary_power_work_count, excavation_work_count, road_closure_work_count) = hoisting_work_count THEN '吊装作业' WHEN GREATEST(hot_work_count, confined_space_work_count, blind_plate_work_count, high_altitude_work_count, hoisting_work_count, temporary_power_work_count, excavation_work_count, road_closure_work_count) = temporary_power_work_count THEN '临时用电作业' WHEN GREATEST(hot_work_count, confined_space_work_count, blind_plate_work_count, high_altitude_work_count, hoisting_work_count, temporary_power_work_count, excavation_work_count, road_closure_work_count) = excavation_work_count THEN '动土作业' WHEN GREATEST(hot_work_count, confined_space_work_count, blind_plate_work_count, high_altitude_work_count, hoisting_work_count, temporary_power_work_count, excavation_work_count, road_closure_work_count) = road_closure_work_count THEN '断路作业' END AS max_type FROM v_ai_ipark_job_special_job_today;

sentence: 今天XX企业的高危作业总数是多少？
sql: SELECT SUM(hot_work_count + confined_space_work_count + blind_plate_work_count + high_altitude_work_count + hoisting_work_count + temporary_power_work_count + excavation_work_count + road_closure_work_count) AS total_high_risk_work_count FROM v_ai_ipark_job_special_job_today WHERE company_code = 'XX';

sentence: 园区今天哪类高危作业数量最多？
sql: SELECT CASE WHEN hot_work_count >= ALL (confined_space_work_count, blind_plate_work_count, high_altitude_work_count, hoisting_work_count, temporary_power_work_count, excavation_work_count, road_closure_work_count) THEN '动火作业' WHEN confined_space_work_count >= ALL (hot_work_count, blind_plate_work_count, high_altitude_work_count, hoisting_work_count, temporary_power_work_count, excavation_work_count, road_closure_work_count) THEN '受限空间作业' WHEN blind_plate_work_count >= ALL (hot_work_count, confined_space_work_count, high_altitude_work_count, hoisting_work_count, temporary_power_work_count, excavation_work_count, road_closure_work_count) THEN '盲板抽堵作业' WHEN high_altitude_work_count >= ALL (hot_work_count, confined_space_work_count, blind_plate_work_count, hoisting_work_count, temporary_power_work_count, excavation_work_count, road_closure_work_count) THEN '高处作业' WHEN hoisting_work_count >= ALL (hot_work_count, confined_space_work_count, blind_plate_work_count, high_altitude_work_count, temporary_power_work_count, excavation_work_count, road_closure_work_count) THEN '吊装作业' WHEN temporary_power_work_count >= ALL (hot_work_count, confined_space_work_count, blind_plate_work_count, high_altitude_work_count, hoisting_work_count, excavation_work_count, road_closure_work_count) THEN '临时用电作业' WHEN excavation_work_count >= ALL (hot_work_count, confined_space_work_count, blind_plate_work_count, high_altitude_work_count, hoisting_work_count, temporary_power_work_count, road_closure_work_count) THEN '动土作业' WHEN road_closure_work_count >= ALL (hot_work_count, confined_space_work_count, blind_plate_work_count, high_altitude_work_count, hoisting_work_count, temporary_power_work_count, excavation_work_count) THEN '断路作业' END AS most_dangerous_job FROM v_ai_ipark_job_special_job_today WHERE park_code = 'DaiShanEconomicDevelopmentZone';

sentence: 园区有没有视频监控设备处于离线状态？
sql: SELECT * FROM v_ai_ipark_platform_video_device_info WHERE park_name = '园区' AND device_state = '离线';

sentence: 当前园区中是否存在设备ID重复的情况？
sql: SELECT device_id FROM v_ai_ipark_platform_video_device_info GROUP BY device_id HAVING COUNT(device_id) > 1;

sentence: 园区某企业的视频监控设备ID是多少？
sql: SELECT device_id FROM v_ai_ipark_platform_video_device_info WHERE park_name = '园区';

sentence: 园区视频监控设备按视频分类有哪些类型？

sentence: 园区有哪些企业部署了视频监控设备？
sql: SELECT DISTINCT enterprise_name FROM v_ai_ipark_platform_video_device_info WHERE park_name = '园区';

sentence: 园区上季度每个月的一级指标扣分次数分别是多少？
sql: SELECT one_index AS 一级指标名称, stat_year_month AS 年月, SUM(deduction_count) AS 扣分次数 FROM v_ai_ipark_ra_risk_deduction_records_mon WHERE stat_year_month BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 QUARTER), '%Y-%m-01') AND DATE_FORMAT(LAST_DAY(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 QUARTER)), '%Y-%m-%d') GROUP BY one_index, stat_year_month ORDER BY one_index, stat_year_month;

sentence: 能查一下2024年3月园区所有一级指标的扣分次数吗？
sql: SELECT one_index, deduction_count FROM v_ai_ipark_ra_risk_deduction_records_mon WHERE stat_year_month = '2024-03';

sentence: 一级指标“设备维护”在2023年11月有没有扣分记录？
sql: SELECT * FROM v_ai_ipark_ra_risk_deduction_records_mon WHERE one_index = '设备维护' AND stat_year_month = '2023-11';

sentence: 能否查到园区2024年2月所有一级指标及其对应的扣分次数？
sql: SELECT one_index AS 一级指标, deduction_count AS 扣分次数 FROM v_ai_ipark_ra_risk_deduction_records_mon WHERE stat_year_month = '2024-02';

sentence: 过去三个月中，园区在哪些年月、哪些一级指标上被扣过分？
sql: SELECT stat_year_month, one_index FROM v_ai_ipark_ra_risk_deduction_records_mon WHERE stat_year_month >= DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE() - INTERVAL 3 MONTH, '%Y-%m') AND deduction_count > 0;

sentence: 哪几个一级指标在2023年11月被扣分了？各扣了几次？
sql: SELECT one_index, SUM(deduction_count) AS total_deductions FROM v_ai_ipark_ra_risk_deduction_records_mon WHERE stat_year_month = '2023-11' GROUP BY one_index;

sentence: 园区2023年9月的风险月度记录里，一级指标‘能源管理’有没有扣分？
sql: SELECT deduction_count FROM v_ai_ipark_ra_risk_deduction_records_mon WHERE one_index = '能源管理' AND stat_year_month = '2023-09';

sentence: ‘人员管理’这个一级指标在过去一年里有几个月被扣过分？
sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT stat_year_month) AS months_with_deductions FROM v_ai_ipark_ra_risk_deduction_records_mon WHERE one_index = '人员管理' AND stat_year_month >= DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE() - INTERVAL 1 YEAR, '%Y-%m') AND stat_year_month < DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m');

sentence: 园区在2023年8月的风险扣分中，一级指标名称和对应的扣分次数是什么？
sql: SELECT one_index AS 一级指标名称, deduction_count AS 扣分次数 FROM v_ai_ipark_ra_risk_deduction_records_mon WHERE stat_year_month = '2023-08';

sentence: 2024年1月园区‘应急管理’这一级指标的扣分次数是多少？
sql: SELECT deduction_count FROM v_ai_ipark_ra_risk_deduction_records_mon WHERE one_index = '应急管理' AND stat_year_month = '2024-01';

sentence: 有没有哪个月园区完全没有在任何一级指标上被扣分？
sql: SELECT stat_year_month FROM v_ai_ipark_ra_risk_deduction_records_mon GROUP BY stat_year_month HAVING SUM(deduction_count) = 0;

sentence: 上季度园区各一级指标的月度扣分次数分别是多少？
